ref: You didn't have much before I came, but the Lord has blessed everything I have ever done for you. Now it's time for me to start looking out for my own family.
text: Ɔluakɛ ɛnee wɔ nyɛmoa le ekyi bie yɛɛ membale a, kɛkala bɛ nwo ɛzo dɔɔnwo kpalɛ, yɛɛ medame me ti, Ɛdɛnkɛma ɛyila wɔ wɔ debie biala anu. Na kɛkala menea a akee yedwu mekɛ mɔɔ ɔwɔ kɛ medwenle me sua nu amra anwo a.”
translated: When they had finished doing that, they went to the bush path and prepared a trap, and when the animals came out in the night, they caught some. And they went and gave some to the king, the Edinkra, in all the surrounding villages. And the king was so pleased that he gave them a lot of money and they became rich people in the town.

ref: When the man saw that he could not win, he struck Jacob on the hip and threw it out of joint.
text: Na mɔɔ nrenya ne nwunle kɛ yeangola yeangomo Gyekɔbo anwo zo la, ɔvale ɔ sa ɔhanle Gyekɔbo ɛzɔlɛ, na Gyekɔbo adwongu huanenle wɔ ɛfutulɛ ne anu.
translated: When he had finished speaking, he rose and went to the Gyekɔbo shrine, and when he got to the Gyekɔbo shrine, he found that the Gyekɔbo priest was not at home.

ref: So God created humans to be like himself; he made men and women.

translated: God created the world for man and for his own pleasure; He created the world and man for His own pleasure. Man is nothing without Him.

ref: Get some good lumber and build a boat. Put rooms in it and cover it with tar inside and out.

translated: The hunter took his gun and went to the bush; he walked a very long distance and was tired and his gun nearly fell from him.

translated: When he finished speaking, the woman who was behind turned round and said, it is not every day that a man beats his wife and she does not die, that is why I am not afraid of you, God will judge between you and me another day. And she turned and went into the room and locked the door.

translated: When they had finished doing this, they gave me a sheep as a gift, and the queen herself poured liquor for me, she gave me a lot of food, and the Edwira festival was being celebrated everywhere. And the queen told me that I should not be afraid because I was under her protection.

ref: When the man saw that he could not win, he struck Jacob on the hip and threw it out of joint.

ref: I will give you and them the land in which you are now a foreigner. I will give the whole land of Canaan to your family forever, and I will be their God.
